title: Noise Ordinance
text: It shall be unlawful to produce or permit amplified sound after 10:00 PM within 300 feet of any residence.

title: Temporary Signs
text: Yard sale signs may be posted for up to 48 hours. Signs must be removed promptly thereafter.

title: Sanitation
text: Trash bins must be removed from curb by 7:00 PM on collection day.
